headline: Abacus Global Management Announces Key Leadership Appointments
summary: ORLANDO, Fla., April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Abacus Global Management, Inc. (“Abacus” or the “Company”) (NYSE: ABX), a leader in the alternative asset management industry, today announced several key leadership appointments effective April 17, 2026, reflecting the continued growth and organizational development of the Company. headline: AT&T Stock Is Struggling. How Earnings Can Ease Price-War Worries.
